scenario: Airfield generated placements - skipFlatSearch branch selection before gating
note: Historical behaviour: all airfield-layout generated structures are pushed with skipFlatSearch: true (AirfieldLayoutGenerator.ts line 290 pre-fix), regardless of zone. Perimeter props (guard towers, ZPU-4 AA) sit at the envelope shoulder where sub-footprint terrain variation is real, and the centroid-Y snap causes footprint corner float / sink amplified by STRUCTURE_SCALE = 2.5.

foundationClearanceSymptom.observedBehaviour: floating / sunken foundations at perimeter radius on sloped envelope shoulder
